title: Create: New Age Recrafting
description: New recipes for Create: New Age mod by antarcticgardens team. Goes well with my resource pack in terms of appearance
body:
**New recipes for Create addon-mod - Create: New Age. This data pack replaces some of the original mod recipes with new ones, which I think adds a bit of complexity to the gameplay.**

The following recipes have been changed: all 3 energisers, connector, carbon brushes, generator coil, layered, fluxuated and netherite magnets, all heat stuff and some of atomic stuff, which you can check yourself.

The new crafts are aimed at adding complexity and matching the look of my resource pack, a link to which you can find below. Examples of modified crafts can be found in the images tab.

[Curseforge Create: New Age mod page.](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-new-age)

[Modrinth Create: New Age Retexture resource pack page.   ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/create-new-age-retexture)

[Curseforge Create: New Age Retexture resource pack page.   ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-new-age-retexture)
